title: GlobalStateV1
description: System-level orchestrator state. Read before every invocation. Governs which season is active and system operating status.
$comment:
Governing contract: ORCHESTRATOR-EXECUTION-CONTRACT.md Section II, Section IX
"Before every action: Read GlobalState" — fields are the minimum required
to establish operating context on each stateless invocation.

activeSeason.description: Identifier of the season currently being processed. Maps to /runs/{season}/ directory path.

activeRunPath.description: Relative path to the active run directory. e.g., runs/2024_OFFSEASON/

systemStatus.description: System-level operating status. 'halted' blocks all invocations.
